title: Jacobs Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: DALLAS , Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Jacobs (NYSE:J) has declared a quarterly cash dividend payable to shareholders in the amount of $0.26 per share of Jacobs common stock.

title: Strength Seen in Jacobs Solutions (J): Can Its 3.7% Jump Turn into More Strength?
text: Jacobs Solutions (J) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: Jacobs (J) to Lead Design for NEOM's Port Transformation
text: Jacobs (J) leads the way in transforming NEOM's Port into a green, automated logistics hub.

title: Jacobs Awarded Design Consultant Contract for Global Logistics Hub in Saudi Arabia
text: Port transformation will prioritize sustainability and advanced technology DALLAS , Sept. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE:J) has been appointed by NEOM Company (NEOM) as the lead design consultant for the Port of NEOM redevelopment project in northwest Saudi Arabia.

title: Jacobs (J) to Manage Water Treatment Plant in Connecticut
text: Jacobs (J) secures a ten-year contract worth $25 million to oversee a water treatment plant in Waterbury, CT.

title: Jacobs Awarded Connecticut Water Treatment Plant Contract
text: Leverages digital solutions to expand services and enhance water treatment processes DALLAS , Sept. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE:J) was selected to operate and maintain The City of Waterbury, Connecticut's 38 million gallon-per-day (mgd) conventional surface water treatment plant.

title: Jacobs (J) Wins $28M Florida Turnpike ITS Management Contract
text: Jacobs (J) to manage Florida's Turnpike Enterprise's Intelligent Transportation System.

title: Jacobs to Manage Intelligent Transportation System for Florida's Turnpike
text: Supports use of data analytics and technology to improve critical transportation infrastructure Contract drives efficient travel and commerce via traffic management systems DALLAS , Sept. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE:J) was selected to operate and maintain Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS) and manage traffic operations for Florida's Turnpike Enterprise, a division of the Florida Department of Transportation.

title: Jacobs (J) to Manage $517 Million Austin ISD Capital Program
text: Jacobs (J) secures a five-year contract worth $517 million to oversee key improvements in Austin ISD, marking a significant boost for the company's growth.

title: Jacobs to Manage Austin Independent School District Modernization Program
text: Largest capital program in district's history addresses aging infrastructure and community development DALLAS , Sept. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE: J) was selected by Austin Independent School District (ISD) in Austin, Texas to provide program management services in support of the district's capital improvement program.
